title: [09JUL2025] The JDI Way - Issue
summary: Most companies hide problems. Toyota built an empire upon them. Faced with post-war scarcity, fragmented demand, and limited capital, Toyota couldn't copy Ford's mass production model to survive, but this constraint became their greatest gift.

title: [04FEB2026] The JDI Way - Issue
summary: You’re in a meeting. Someone says something that triggers you. You push back. They double down. Emotions rise. Learning stops.

title: [13FEB2026] The JDI Way - Issue
summary: You're facing challenges. Your problems seem to multiply. As they grow, so does your stress. Your progress stops. Your confidence fades. You need help.
